name: TCIL_GetValuePresentationData
title: TCIL_GetValuePresentationData
syntax: long TCIL_GetValuePresentationData(dbNode client, dword ddi, dword elementNumber,dword idOfDVP, long offset, float scale, dword numberOfDecimals, dword designatorBufferSize, char designatorBuffer[]); // form 1: deprecated with 13
long TCIL_GetValuePresentationData(dbNode client, dword ddi, dword elementNumber,dword idOfDVP, long offset, float scale,dword numberOfDecimals, char designatorBuffer[]); // form 2
long TCIL_GetValuePresentationData(dword addressClient, dword ddi, dword elementNumber,dword idOfDVP, long offset, float scale,dword numberOfDecimals, char designatorBuffer[]); // form 3

long TCIL_GetValuePresentationData(dbNode tc, dbNode client, dword ddi, dword elementNumber,dword idOfDVP, long offset, float scale, dword numberOfDecimals,dword designatorBufferSize, char designatorBuffer[]); // form 4: deprecated with 13
long TCIL_GetValuePresentationData(dbNode tc, dbNode client, dword ddi, dword elementNumber,dword idOfDVP, long offset, float scale,dword numberOfDecimals, char designatorBuffer[]); // form 5
long TCIL_GetValuePresentationData(dbNode tc, dword addressClient, dword ddi, dword elementNumber,dword idOfDVP, long offset, float scale,dword numberOfDecimals, char designatorBuffer[]); // form 6
description: Returns all properties (id, offset, scale, numberDecimals, designator) of the ValuePresentation object referenced by the DeviceProcessData (DPD) or DeviceProperty (DPT) object defined by DDI/elementNumber.
Form 5 and 6 applicable in test module / test unit only.

parameters.name: tc
parameters.description: TC simulation node to apply the function.

parameters.name: client
parameters.description: TC client node the data entity belongs to.

parameters.name: addressClient
parameters.description: Address of the TC client node the data entity belongs to.

parameters.name: ddi
parameters.description: Data dictionary identifier of DPD/DPT object, 0x0000..0xFFFF.

parameters.name: idOfDVP
parameters.description: ID of the referenced DVP object. 0xFF means no DVP object is referenced.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Property offset of the referenced DVP object.

parameters.name: scale
parameters.description: Property scale of the referenced DVP object.

parameters.name: numberOfDecimals
parameters.description: Property numberOfDecimals of the referenced DVP object.

parameters.name: designatorBuffer
parameters.description: Return buffer. Contains the designator of the DVP ojects as a string.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
